passives.name: Stormraider
passives.effects: Dealing damage to an enemy champion equal to {{as|25% of their '''maximum''' health}} within {{fd|2.5}} seconds inflicts them with ''Squall'' (30 second cooldown, starts on ''Squall's'' application).

passives.name: Squall
passives.effects: After 2 seconds of having applied ''Squall'', strike the target with lightning, dealing {{as|125|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 10% AP)}} {{as|magic damage}} to them. If the target dies before being struck, they emit an electric field instantly that shocks all enemy champions in a {{tip|cr|icononly=true}} 600 radius, dealing them the same damage.

effects_structured.raw: Dealing 25% of a champion's max health within 2.5 seconds applies Squall (30s cooldown).
2 seconds after applying Squall, lightning strikes for 125 (+10% AP) magic damage.
If the target dies before the strike, they emit an electric field that shocks enemies in 600 radius for the same damage.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Stormsurge is modeled as a burst-finisher cycle: threshold tagging (Stormraider) followed by delayed strike (Squall) or immediate death-triggered area discharge.
Death-trigger discharge reuses the same base + AP damage profile as the delayed strike and changes only timing and area targeting.
